arts.sum: Osasuna are now winless in eight ahead of Sunday's welcome of Girona. That said, they have drawn their last two, and this weekend's game presents them with a great chance to get back to winning ways. ...

arts.ttl: Barcelona escape punishment after accusation of using ineligible player
arts.sum: Barcelona will not face punishment for fielding an ineligible player last month in their 3-0 win over Osasuna, after the Disciplinary Committee ruled in their favour. The case centred around an injury to Inigo Martinez. Before the March international break, Inigo Martinez was called up by Spain for their Nations League games. However after picking […] The post Barcelona escape punishment after accusation of using ineligible player appeared first on Football España.
